[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 10001010 3
2 01100000 2
3 00010011 3
4 00001000 1
5 00000001 1
6 00001100 2
7 01100111 5

01 10 00000101 2
12 21 00000101 2
23 32 00000000 a match 0

70 07 00000001 1 match 5

47 74 00000000 a match 0

61 16 00000010 1
72 27 00000001 1 match 5
